offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate billing causes late fees and service interruptions. We monitor utility bill payments and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to late fees and service interruptions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
Send DMs to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try monthly anomaly reporting on 1-3 bills
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
